title: Pastoral Team Member (Missions)
description:
Responsibilities

  • Manage the overall support, engagement and care of the Missions Ministry Workers including planning of annual mission worker retreat and visits to locations where overseas workers are based.
  • Strengthen the process and training system of raising potential candidates and interns for missions work.
  • Plan, design and conduct training modules on missions’ awareness and missions members care for church members.
  • Plan, coordinate, provide support and budget for Missions Month, Missions Sunday and related Missions awareness programmes.
  • Recruit and train volunteers to support mission activities.
  • Collaborate with partner organizations and agencies to maximize the impact of mission programs.
  • Prepare regular reports on mission activities and outcomes.
  • Develop and recommend a comprehensive missions strategy aligned with the church's overall vision and goals.
  • Conduct needs assessments to identify fields or partnership opportunities where the church can make an impact.
  • Perform assigned congregational duties and ensure smooth flow of logistics and technical support.
  • Perform any other duties as assigned including teaching/preaching, attending to walk-ins, conduct home blessings, hospital visits and wake services.


Requirements

  • Have at least two years prior experience in similar capacity
  • Pastoral heart of servanthood
  • Strong communication skills, team player
  • Good planner and organizer who is able to meet deadline
  • Willing to work on weekends
  • Theology certification is an added advantage.

postedCompany.description:
Faith Methodist Church had its beginnings in 1966 as a Methodist Chapel to serve the residents of Queenstown. Before the church building was completed, worship services were conducted in the open air and later in a temporary shed.  


In 1967, with God’s enabling, the founding pastor of Faith Methodist Church, Rev T.C Nga and his team saw to the completion of the church building, which we share with our sister Chinese Methodist Church. The church was named Faith Methodist Church in honour of God’s faithfulness in the entire project and in memory of Faith Goh, the only daughter of Dr Goh & Mrs Goh Kok Kee, who were gracious donors to the church building fund.  


By God's faithfulness, Faith's membership grew and the church facilities were inadequate to meet the needs of the congregation. Hence, the church building was redeveloped from 2002 to 2003.  


Today, the church building houses a 1000-seat sanctuary, 800-seat worship hall, two levels of parking, as well as a kindergarten, playground, library and a columbarium. The building is also equipped with lifts and ramps to cater to seniors who are mobility-challenged.  


From 38 attendees when it first started, Faith’s congregation has grown to some 2,000+ today.  


Commitment to community outreach and missions is at the heart of Faith. From the setting up of Lakeside Family Centre, Jurong Preaching Point (now Agape Methodist Church) and FaithActs community service agency, to active involvement in international ministry in the regions beyond, by God’s grace, Faith is still transforming lives and changing the world for Christ after four decades.
postedCompany.name: FAITH METHODIST CHURCH
